summary: Current main still has the Zalo proactive outbound target bug: Zalo strips zalo/zl prefixes, then delegates direct-id detection to the shared numeric-only predicate, so nonnumeric chat_id values do not enter the direct target path. #57594 remains the canonical issue. #93689 is the hydrated active fix candidate, but it is an excluded existing-overlap ref with merge-risk/failing-check/review-state blockers, so this run should not emit merge or replacement-fix actions.
